MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Wehr of Bradshaw & Associates (433.4800) for plaintiff and responding party
Megan Lewis of Wilke Fleury Hoffelt Gould & Birney (916.441.2430) for defendant & moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WESTERN TRUCK PARTS & EQUIPMENT COMPANY, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied as to the breach of contract and breach of warranty that arises from the contract. CC section 1717. The motion is granted as to the fraud claim. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Wehr of Bradshaw & Associates (433.4800) for plaintiff and responding party
Megan Lewis of Wilke Fleury Hoffelt Gould & Birney (916.441.2430) for defendant & moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WESTERN TRUCK PARTS & EQUIPMENT COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff may plead the meaning of an alleged contract where the interpretation is reasonable. Aragon-Haas v. Family Security Ins. Services, Inc. (1991) 231 Cal. App. 3d 232, 239. Plaintiff has done so in paragraphs 14 and 29. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Cal-Con Pumping, LLC.'s motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories, requests for admissions, and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve supplemental verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order.
